Through essays and interviews with designers and builders, it explores where design flourishes in this age of sameness.

A sewn-bound paperback will begin shipping soon.

https://t.co/sonawOAMnK https://t.co/SFvqxGUdpY

artifacts.title: Niche receipt from 2025-03-12
artifacts.excerpt:
"building as gardening" is a perspective I've heard over and over while talking to some niche builders

in the build-fast-break-things-pivot-again culture, I think that's a healthier way to make stuff; you don't reinforce a solution but rather let it grow more organically
